changes: Ghost rework: ghosts now track you with their eyes
New ghost burst attack — ghosts shake, make a scary face, and rapid-fire two homing shots
Ghosts periodically phase out while wandering — they become intangible and transparent
Parried ghost projectiles now home onto nearby enemies
Gamepad/controller support with configurable bindings (ESC menu)
Performance improvements: viewport culling, snapshot caching, 15Hz tick rate
Lion rework: pounces are now dodgeable — lions commit to a direction during windup
Lions predict your movement and lead their pounces
New melee swipe attack when lions catch you by running
Lions scale speed to match your stats — no more outrunning them
Mobile support: virtual joysticks, touch controls, and landscape mode
Scorched Stag now rewards 400 Source on kill
Added interactive signs to the safe zone
Patch notes, active rules, and admin notices now viewable in-game
